case_title: MARTHA MCGRAW VS. SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAY-12-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES INTEND TO AMEND THEIR COMPLAINT AND AGREE TO WAIVE SERVICE ON THE AMENDED COMPLAINT AND THE AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAIVED SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-11-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-29-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL
ORDER ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCGRAW, MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL
DECLARATION OF SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL RE: CHANGING PRAYER AMOUNT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL
AMENDED CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MCGRAW, MARTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL
REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON MAY-12-2016 IN DEPT. 506 -DUPLICATE ENTRY.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MCGRAW, MARTHA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED NOV-17-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL

DECLARATION OF MARTHA MCGROW RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGRAW, MARTHA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGRAW, MARTHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BEAUTIFUL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
